name: @memesen/app
description: MSN Messenger over Nostr — a faithful early-2000s instant-messenger UI on real encrypted Nostr DMs, identities and relays (React + Bun).

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.html --outdir dist --minify && cp -R public/. dist/
scripts.test:e2e: echo 'No E2E suite yet — add Playwright here, kept separate from unit/integration on purpose.' && exit 1
